chapter_title.en: The Prayer for Seeking Rain (salat Al-istisqa)

text: 1503 - وَ سُئِلَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: عَنْ تَحْوِيلِ اَلنَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ رِدَاءَهُ إِذَا اِسْتَسْقَى قَالَ «عَلاَمَةٌ بَيْنَهُ وَ بَيْنَ أَصْحَابِهِ تَحَوَّلَ اَلْجَدْبُ خِصْباً.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1503 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) was asked about why The Prophet (sw) would turn his cloak around when he prayed for rain (Istisqa').
Imam (as) said: "It was a sign between him and his companions, indicating that drought had turned into abundance."
